description: At hand-back, execution-to-prd reads prd-draft.json catching a SyntaxError as a missing draft, discards a draft that is schema-invalid, staler than its decisions log, or from a prior session, accepts only the stable fields, and authors the decision-bearing fields (implementation_decisions, testing_decisions) live.
title: execution-to-prd verifies and lands the speculative draft, never trusting decision fields
acceptance_criteria: A schema-invalid prd-draft.json is discarded and a from-scratch PRD lands with no error
A draft with poisoned implementation_decisions yields decision fields authored live, not copied from the draft
A draft staler than its grill-decisions.log, or from a prior session, is not loaded
Src-First: byte-identical src/template and root mirror
